ExtraProperties.Name: TermsAndConditions
ExtraProperties.Label: Terms and Conditions
ExtraProperties.Text:
1.      Southern California Edison Company (“SCE”) and Southern California Gas Company (“SoCalGas”), each a California Investor-Owned Utility (individually, an “IOU” and collectively, the “IOUs”), may modify or discontinue the Pilot Plus/ Deep initiative, herein referred to as the Energy Savings Assistance (“ESA”) Whole Home (“Program”) at any time in their sole discretion, without prior notice, or by order of the California Public Utilities Commission (“CPUC”). The Program is funded by California utility customers and administered by the IOUs under the auspices of the CPUC and are subject to the availability of funds.

a.      The Program offers customers a limited number of energy-efficient models to help reduce energy bills. Replacement units may not be equipped with the same features as your existing units, and you may decline the new energy-efficient products (also referred to as “Measures”) being offered for any reason.

                                                       i.      Replacement Refrigerators have been deemed by their respective manufacturer to be compliant with the American Disability Act (“ADA”), where applicable; replacements are white top-freezer models and do not come equipped with icemakers or water dispensers.

2.      I understand that the Measure(s) identified on this Installation Report Form have been installed at the specified installation address by an authorized, licensed contractor (“Contractor(s)”) and that the installation occurred in the stated location.

3.      I understand the Contractor must install all measures in accordance with all local, state, and federal building codes and agree to grant permission to the IOUs, their authorized Contractor(s), city, county, state or municipal building inspectors and any other Program representatives, as applicable, reasonable access to my home and property to perform any applicable inspection(s).

a.      If during inspection, any work related to the installed measures requires adjustment, repair or, replacement due to permit requirements, an authorized, licensed Contractor will perform such work at no charge.

b.      I understand that upon acceptance of the replacement Measure(s), the old equipment or product(s) being replaced will be dismantled and recycled in accordance with all applicable laws. 

c.       If Contractor(s) fail to install any anticipated Measure(s), I have received a satisfactory explanation from the Contractor(s) of the reason(s) that they were not able to install the Measure(s).

d.      I acknowledge and agree that the IOUs have not authorized any additional services, improvements, installations, or equipment other than the installed Measures (which may include outlet grounding) indicated on this Installation Report Form, and I understand that the IOUs assume no liability for such services, improvements, installations, or equipment. I acknowledge and agree that the IOUs makes no representations or covenants as to the safety, reliability and/or efficiency of the Measures.

4.      I understand that the Contractor(s) will provide me with a copy of the manufacturers product guide and have instructed me about the proper operation of the installed measure(s) and explained any applicable warranties.

5.      Once the Measure(s) have been installed by the Contractor(s), the removal, replacement, modification, or failure to properly maintain the installed measure(s) according to manufacturer guidelines may void all applicable warranties.

a.      I agree to release the IOUs from any claims, and that the IOUs will not be liable in any manner, for any damages or losses that arise out of or in conjunction with the installation of the Measure(s), including, but not limited to the installation or operation of said Measure(s).

b.      I understand that I am responsible to read the manufacturers product guide and to complete and mail-in the warranty card included for each applicable Measure that I may receive from the Program.

6.      I acknowledge and agree that the IOUs shall not be liable in any manner, for any damages or losses arising out of any act or omission of the Contractor(s) or any sub-contractor(s) in performing the work to install the Measures or arising out of or in conjunction with the installation and operation of the Measure(s) (the “Work”), and I hereby release and waive the IOUs from and against all claims that may arise in connection with the Work.

a.      I agree to hold the assigned Contractor(s) solely responsible for the performance of the Work and for all claims, losses, liabilities, damages, and expenses (including attorneys’ fees and costs) that may arise because of the Work.

b.      Furthermore, I agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the IOUs and their respective officers and employees against any and all action, liability, damages, demands or costs, for injury to or death or any and all persons whatsoever, and for any and all damage to property, in any manner arising from, or in connection with, the performance of the Work hereunder, except for the damages caused solely by the gross negligence or willful misconduct of the IOUs.

7.      I understand that should I have any questions regarding the installed Measure(s), the Contractor(s) or any item contained on this form, that I may contact Contractor Customer Support at 888-438-5497 between 8:00 A.M and 5:00 P.M. (PT) Monday through Friday for additional information.

8.      I understand that should I have any questions regarding the installed measure(s), the contractor or any item contained on this form, that I may contact Contractor Customer Support at 833-367-5497 between 8:00 A.M and 5:00 P.M. (PST) Monday through Friday for additional information.

For Renter/Tenants:

a)      I understand that I may receive no charge repair or replacement services to certain appliances paid-for by the Program.

b)      I will not remove at any time the installed Measure(s) with the following exception:

i.                  I may remove the new Measure only if I owned the original Measure that is being replaced under the Program.

ii.                 If I do not own the original Measure that is being replaced under the Program, I may remove that new Measure with a written authorization of the owner of the old (original) appliance.
